mnemonics: Layers are stacked like pizza, TCP/IP is a suite, OSI is a model, Physical is the base
TCP/IP and OSI are like two roads, Physical is the path they take
keyPoints: The OSI model has 7 layers, TCP/IP is a subset of OSI, Physical Layer is the foundation
Transmission media includes Guided Media (cable) and Unguided Media (Wireless)
Guided Media has a physical path, Unguided Media does not, Wireless is Unguided Media
TCP/IP uses IP and TCP protocols, OSI uses multiple protocols
Physical Layer defines how data is transmitted, it's the base of the OSI model
